description: Live jazz performances by local artists every weekend from 6PM to 9PM. Free admission for all mall visitors.
Month-long arts and crafts workshops for kids ages 5-12. Registration fee of PHP 500 per session includes materials.
Showcase of latest tech gadgets with exclusive mall discounts up to 30% off on selected electronics brands.
Annual pearl festival featuring South Sea pearls and freshwater pearl jewelry at special prices direct from pearl farms.
Curated food fair showcasing regional dishes from across the country with cooking demonstrations.
Pop-up market for vinyl record collectors featuring rare finds from the 60s to 90s plus live DJ sets.
Partner event with local animal welfare groups featuring adoptable dogs and cats. Free basic vet checkup for first 50 adopters.
Every Saturday guided art walks through galleries and open studios with featured artist talks at 2PM.
Free yoga sessions meditation workshops and wellness talks. Complimentary health screenings available.
Curated collection from local designers showcasing sustainable and resort-ready fashion.
